content:
{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
[[File:TESB_poster.jpg|thumb|200px|[[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''Star Wars'': Episode V ''The Empire Strikes Back'']] released in May 1980.]]

A list of events in '''1980''' related to ''Star Wars''.

==January==
*[[January 1|01]] – ''[[The Second Kessel Run]]'' serial begins at the [[Los Angeles Times Syndicate]].
*[[January 2|02]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 97]] published.
*02 – [[Georgina Cordova]] is born.
*[[January 4|04]] – [[Greg Cipes]] is born.
*[[January 9|09]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 98]] published.
*[[January 16|16]] – [[Lin-Manuel Miranda]] is born.
*16 – [[Star Wars Weekly 99]] published.
*[[January 18|18]] – [[Daniel José Older]] is born.
*[[January 22|22]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 34|''Star Wars'' (1977) 34]] published.
*[[January 23|23]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 100]] published.
*[[January 30|30]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 101]] published.

==February==
*[[February 6|06]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 102]] published.
*[[February 12|12]] – [[Heather Doerksen]] is born.
*[[February 13|13]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 103]] published.
*[[February 20|20]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 104]] published.
*[[February 26|26]] – ''[[Bring Me the Children]]'' serial begins at the [[Los Angeles Times Syndicate]].
*26 – [[Star Wars (1977) 35|''Star Wars'' (1977) 35]] published.
*[[February 27|27]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 105]] published.
*[[February 28|28]] – [[Denise Gough]] is born.

==March==
*[[March 6|06]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 106]] published.
*[[March 12|12]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 107]] published.
*[[March 15|15]] – [[Alex Segura]] is born.
*[[March 19|19]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 108]] published
*[[March 25|25]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 36|''Star Wars'' (1977) 36]] published.
*[[March 26|26]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 109]] published.

==Spring==
*?? – ''[[Marvel Special Edition 2: The Empire Strikes Back]]'' published.
*?? – ''[[Marvel Super Special 16: The Empire Strikes Back]]'' published.

==April==
*[[April 2|02]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 110]] published.
*[[April 8|08]] – [[Katee Sackhoff]] is born.
*[[April 9|09]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 111]] published.
*[[April 12|12]] – [[Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back (novelization)|''Star Wars
Episode V: The Empire Strikes Back'' novelization]] published.
*12 – ''[[The Empire Strikes Back Storybook]]'' published.
*[[April 16|16]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 112]] published.
*[[April 22|22]] – ''[[As Long As We Live...]]'' serial begins at the [[Los Angeles Times Syndicate]].
*22 – [[Star Wars (1977) 37|''Star Wars'' (1977) 37]] published.
*[[April 23|23]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 113]] published.
*[[April 30|30]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 114]] published.

==May==
*[[May 7|07]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 115]] published.
*[[May 14|14]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 116]] published.
*[[May 21|21]] – [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|'''''Star Wars''''': '''Episode V''' '''''The Empire Strikes Back''''']] released.
*21 – [[Star Wars Weekly 117]] published.
*[[May 27|27]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 38|''Star Wars'' (1977) 38]] published.
*[[May 29|29]] – [[The Empire Strikes Back Weekly 118]] published.
*?? – ''[[The Marvel Comics Illustrated Version of Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back]]'' published.

==June==
*[[June 5|05]] – [[The Empire Strikes Back Weekly 119]] published.
*[[June 12|12]] – [[The Empire Strikes Back Weekly 120]] published.
*[[June 17|17]] – ''[[The Frozen World of Ota]]'' serial begins at the [[Los Angeles Times Syndicate]].
*[[June 19|19]] – [[The Empire Strikes Back Weekly 121]] published.
*[[June 24|24]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 39|''Star Wars'' (1977) 39]] published.
*[[June 25|25]] – [[The Empire Strikes Back Weekly 122]] published.

==July==
*[[July 2|02]] – [[The Empire Strikes Back Weekly 123]] published.
*[[July 9|09]] – [[The Empire Strikes Back Weekly 124]] published.
*[[July 16|16]] – [[The Empire Strikes Back Weekly 125]] published.
*[[July 22|22]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 40|''Star Wars'' (1977) 40]] published.
*[[July 24|24]] – [[The Empire Strikes Back Weekly 126]] published.
*[[July 31|31]] – [[The Empire Strikes Back Weekly 127]] published.

==August==
*[[August 7|07]] – [[The Empire Strikes Back Weekly 128]] published.
*[[August 11|11]] – ''[[Planet of Kadril]] ''serial begins at the [[Los Angeles Times Syndicate]].
*[[August 12|12]] – ''[[Han Solo and the Lost Legacy]]'' published.
*12 – ''[[Once Upon a Galaxy: A Journal of the Making of The Empire Strikes Back]]'' published.
*[[August 14|14]] – [[The Empire Strikes Back Weekly 129]] published.
*[[August 21|21]] – [[The Empire Strikes Back Weekly 130]] published.
*[[August 28|28]] – [[The Empire Strikes Back Weekly 131]] published.

==September==
*[[September 2|02]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 41|''Star Wars'' (1977) 41]] published.
*[[September 4|04]] – [[The Empire Strikes Back Weekly 132]] published.
*[[September 11|11]] – [[The Empire Strikes Back Weekly 133]] published.
*[[September 14|14]] – [[Anthony Carboni]] is born.
*[[September 18|18]] – [[The Empire Strikes Back Weekly 134]] published.
*[[September 23|23]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 42|''Star Wars'' (1977) 42]] published.
*[[September 24|24]] – [[The Empire Strikes Back Weekly 135]] published.
*[[September 29|29]] – [[Zachary Levi]] is born.
*?? – ''[[Star Wars: The Making of the Movie]]'' published.

==October==
*[[October 1|01]] – [[The Empire Strikes Back Weekly 136]] published.
*01 – [[Kristian Harloff]] is born.
*[[October 6|06]] – [[Han Solo at Stars' End (comic strip)|''Han Solo at Stars' End'']] serial begins at the [[Los Angeles Times Syndicate]].
*[[October 8|08]] – [[The Empire Strikes Back Weekly 137]] published.
*[[October 15|15]] – [[The Empire Strikes Back Weekly 138]] published.
*[[October 22|22]] – [[The Empire Strikes Back Weekly 139]] published.
*[[October 28|28]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 43|''Star Wars'' (1977) 43]] published.

==November==
*[[November 25|25]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 44|''Star Wars'' (1977) 44]] published.
*[[November 29|29]] – [[Janina Gavankar]] is born.
*?? – [[The Empire Strikes Back Monthly 140|''The Empire Strikes Back Monthly'' 140]] published.

==December==
*[[December 16|16]] – [[Michael Jibson]] is born.
*[[December 23|23]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 45|''Star Wars'' (1977) 45]] published.
*[[December 27|27]] – [[Elizabeth Rodriguez]] is born.
*?? – [[The Empire Strikes Back Monthly 141|''The Empire Strikes Back Monthly'' 141]] published.

==Unknown==
*''[[The Making of "The Empire Strikes Back"]]''

----
